UnitAbilities.Title: Big Booms
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s supa-kannon, roll one D6 for the target unit and every other unit within 3" of that unit: on a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by a concussive wave. After this model has finished making its attacks against that target unit this phase, each unit struck by a concussive wave this phase suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Orks Infantry models. Each Mega Armour or Jump Pack model takes up the space of 2 models. This model cannot transport Ghazghkull Thraka models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Da Revolushun!
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Has Yoo Been a Good Little Grot This Year?: Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, you can target this model’s unit with the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dok’s Toolz
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hold Still and Say ‘Aargh!’
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack made by this model with its ’urty syringe scores a Critical Wound against a unit (excluding Vehicle units), that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Drive-by Dakka
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Infos.Title: SPEED FREEKS
Infos.Text: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Warbikers unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Pyromaniaks
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack with a Torrent weapon that targets an enemy unit within 6", re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is also within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

Infos.Title: SPEED FREEKS
Infos.Text: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Warbikers unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Outflank
UnitAbilities.Text: When this unit arrives from Strategic Reserves, it can be set up within your opponent’s deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

Infos.Title: SPEED FREEKS
Infos.Text: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Warbikers unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Splat!
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit containing 10 or more models, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Deff from Above
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Da Biggest Booms
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s krusha kannon, the target unit and every other enemy Infantry unit within 3" of that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Orks Infantry models. Each Mega Armour or Jump Pack model takes up the space of 2 models. This model cannot transport Ghazghkull Thraka models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rolling Fortress
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to an Orks model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Deff Rolla Battle Fortress model, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 22 Orks Infantry models. Each Mega Armour or Jump Pack model takes up the space of 2 models. The Ghazghkull Thraka model takes up the space of 18 models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Big Bomms
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, after the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across during that move and roll six D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Aerial Deployment
UnitAbilities.Text: If this model starts the game in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Orks Infantry models. This model cannot transport Ghazghkull Thraka, Mega Armour or Jump Pack models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Small Bomms
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across during that move and roll three D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Strafing Run
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Small Bomms
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across during that move and roll three D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Interceptor
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Da Bigger Dey Are, da Better Dey Drop
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack made with this model’s lifta-droppa destroys an enemy model that has the Deadly Demise ability, that model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 3+ instead of on a 6.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Furious Barrage
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that contains five or more models, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Kustom Force Field
UnitAbilities.Text: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: More Dakka
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mekaniak
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one friendly Orks Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That Vehicle model regains up to D3 lost wounds, and, until the start of your next Movement phase, each time that Vehicle model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Drill Boss
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Plummeting Descent
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this model’s unit in a turn in which it was set up on the battlefield from Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mad Dok
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: One Scalpel Short of a Medpack
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Abilities.AbilityId: One Scalpel Short of a Medpack

UnitAbilities.Title: Plant the Waaagh! Banner
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the start of the next battle round, this model’s unit gains the benefits of the Waaagh! ability as if you had called a Waaagh! this battle round.

UnitAbilities.Title: Da Boss Iz Watchin’
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is gaining the benefits of the Waaagh! ability, it has a 4+ invulnerable save and an Objective Control characteristic of 5.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ramshackle Cover
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Workshop
UnitAbilities.Text: When this Fortification is set up, all parts of it must be set up within 1” of another part. At the end of your Movement phase, each friendly Orks Vehicle model within 12” of this Fortification can regain up to D3 lost wounds (roll separately for each model). Each model can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortification
UnitAbilities.Text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
	▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. 
	▪ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

Units.Name: BIG MEK WITH KUSTOM FORCE FIELD

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Big Mek with Kustom Force Field

UnitAbilities.Title: Grot Helper
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, the bearer can overcharge its kustom force field one additional time.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer’s Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place a Grot Helper token next to the bearer, removing it once this ability has been used.

UnitAbilities.Title: More Dakka
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Kustom Force Field
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can overcharge its kustom force field. If it does, until the end of the phase, this invulnerable save is improved to 4+.

Keywords: Big Mek with Kustom Force Field

UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy Infantry unit is within 6" of this model, subtract 1 from the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Scatter!
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

UnitAbilities.Title: Bizarrely Resilient
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack targets this model, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

UnitAbilities.Text: Improve this model’s Leadership characteristic by 1 for every 5 models in this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Roar of Mork (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: In your opponent’s Command phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this Psyker and roll one D6: on a 1, this unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the start of your opponent’s next Command phase, that enemy unit is confrazzled. While a unit is confrazzled, each time a Battle-shock or Leadership test is taken for it, subtract 2 from that test.
